18:["$","$1","block-24",{"children":["$","p","p-164",{"className":"text-sm leading-8 text-white/72 sm:text-base","children":"This package binds the canonical Devnet voting lifecycle, zk companion proofs, adversarial rejection behavior, RPC interruption recovery, and finalize/execute collision handling into one reviewer-facing operational surface. It is intended to show that PrivateDAO is not only specified and documented, but also reproducibly exercised under realistic multi-wallet and failure-path conditions."}]}]
